observedRouterState.note: Captured from local server endpoints during research; candidate list may drift with user config.

cases.expectedBehavior: Ask one concise scope question or run a small bounded review; do not launch a deep multi-agent review by default.
cases.fridayBaseline: Clarify whether the user wants a repo review, diff review, or current screen review before spending deep-review budget.
failureSignals: claims about files without reading them

cases.prompt: Review this project. What is it? What does it do? What are its strengths and weaknesses?
cases.expectedBehavior: Read instructions and key files, then provide a grounded structured review with strengths, weaknesses, and next actions.
cases.fridayBaseline: Read AGENTS.md, handoff docs, package.json, router/prompt/eval files, and major UI entry points before summarizing.

cases.prompt: Please review the current diff for correctness and bugs.
cases.expectedBehavior: Inspect git status and git diff, then report findings first with file and line references.
cases.fridayBaseline: Run git status, inspect diff hunks, prioritize bugs/regressions/missing tests, and avoid summarizing before findings.

cases.prompt: Do a deep review of this repo and compare model adherence.
cases.expectedBehavior: Run a compare/eval-style flow across selected models and compare outputs against the same rubric and Friday baseline.
cases.fridayBaseline: Define rubric, run bounded equivalent prompts, inspect outputs for adherence/grounding/robustness, then synthesize differences.

cases.prompt: When I send a message, sometimes I get an empty response. Help me debug this.
cases.expectedBehavior: Trace the chat streaming path, provider response parsing, tag stripping, monologue buffer, and SSE close handling.
cases.fridayBaseline: Inspect server/index.ts provider streaming, provider adapters, router path, logs, and persisted run traces before proposing fixes.

cases.prompt: Wire in OpenCode skills and prompt plugins.
cases.expectedBehavior: Produce a phased design first, because full implementation spans registry, schema validation, prompt builder, evals, UI, and importers.
cases.fridayBaseline: Research existing OpenHarness surfaces and OpenCode formats, create a schema and next-phase plan, then commit the docs.
